name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
☆ reunited - Chuuya sees Dazai for the first time since he left, and everything comes rushing back.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

Stormbringer spoilers, Chuuya’s backstory spoilers, Dazai!POV, mentions of suicide attempts, mentions of inhumane treatment/torture (Chuuya’s backstory)

Chuuya may be a little ooc in this bot because I REALLY like skk but honestly I don’t really care 🤗

There is a tiny mention of the two of them talking about kissing in a flashback from the fifteen arc, but it shouldn’t be a problem because I didn’t talk about it at all, and it’s really just a funny mention to nod towards wacky, puppy love, teen soukoku

im not going to be like “he was so heartbroken… he cried everyday until his big daddy Dazai came back..” or any cringey shit like that, but I’ll try my best to keep him in character while also catering to my fellow skk enjoyers 😈

Started making at: 11:23PM (GST)

Finished making at: 12:15AM (GST)

AN: OMFG I WROTE 1100 TOKENS FOR THE INTRO WTF 😭 THATS MORE THAN THE PERSONALITY WTFF
creator: twindark
